message:
feat(codegen): Fix array.array codegen and add Metal framework linking

- Fix attribute access (a.typecode) for array.array types to use direct
  field access instead of __dict__.get() in misc.zig
- Fix len() for array.array to not wrap __len__() in try since inline
  struct returns usize directly in int_conv.zig
- Fix indexing (a[0]) for array.array to use __getitem__() method
  instead of generic .items[] pattern in subscript.zig
- Add Metal/Foundation framework linking on macOS for GPU acceleration
  in compiler.zig (both single-file and batch compilation paths)
